chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3600 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ لِلْوَلِيدِ بْنِ صَبِيحٍ : "يَا وَلِيدُ لاَ تَشْتَرِ لِي مِنْ مُحَارَفٍ شَيْئاً فَإِنَّ خُلْطَتَهُ لاَ بَرَكَةَ فِيهَا ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3600 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said to Al-Walid ibn Subayh:
"O Walid, do not buy anything for me from one who is engaged in unlawful earnings (Muharif), for there is no blessing in associating with him."
